title: stichorkis benguetensis
intro: Stichorkis benguetensis, also known as Benguet orchid, is a species of orchid native to the Philippines. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including its potential to exhibit antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Stichorkis benguetensis are attributed to its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. In traditional medicine, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is often used to treat various ailments due to its supposed healing properties.
